dattri_IFAttributorEKFAC.note: Full-model EK-FAC. Supports Conv2d. Tested 10 test x 100 train, 8.2s, 10.43GB peak.

trak_TRAKer.note: TRAK attribution. Tested 10 test x 100 train. Uses BasicProjector (fast_jl not installed).

repsim.note: Cosine similarity on penultimate layer (avgpool). Shape [10, 2000].

pydvl_EkfacInfluence.note: Only supports Linear layers, NOT Conv2d. Cannot be used for ResNet-18.

hessian_verification.recommended_library: dattri (IFAttributorEKFAC for EK-FAC, IFAttributorCG for CG-based IF)
hessian_verification.memory_notes: Full-model per-sample gradients for ResNet-18 (11.2M params) require ~10GB for 100 train samples at batch_size=4. For 500 test x 50000 train, will need chunked computation. When GPU 3 is fully available (24GB), batch_size=8-16 should work for attribution computation.

environment.note_trak_import: Package is 'traker' (pip), but import path is 'trak' (not 'traker')
environment.note_cuda_device_order: MUST set CUDA_DEVICE_ORDER=PCI_BUS_ID to match nvidia-smi GPU numbering
